nasb.text: All the skilled women spun with their hands, and brought what they had spun, in blue and purple and scarlet material and in fine linen.

esv.text: And every skillful woman spun with her hands, and they all brought what they had spun in blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen.

cnv.text: 凡是心中有智慧的婦女都親手紡織，把所紡的藍色紫色朱紅色線都帶了來。

ccb.text: 凡懂得纺线的妇女，都把亲手纺成的细麻线和蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线拿来奉献。
